name: Sophia Diamond's Story
description:
Name: Sophia Diamond

Date of birth: 21 August 2001

Place of birth: Russia

Nationality: Canadian of Russian descent

Languages: English, Russian

Sophia Diamond was born in Russia, moved to Israel, and eventually settled in Canada. Her multicultural background gives her a rich perspective and attracts fans from across the globe.

She started using social media in high school and quickly rose to fame through the short video platform TikTok (then known as Musical.ly).

Sophia stands out on social media for her natural, relaxed style. Most of her videos show her dancing skills, humorous moments and fashion outfits.

TikTok

Most of her TikTok posts are:

An uplifting dance.

Funny sitcom video.

Creative clips with pop music.

Her performance style is relaxed and natural, but at the same time, she shows excellent dancing ability, attracting fans worldwide.

Instagram

Sophia is a fashionista who regularly shares photos of her daily life, fitness content and fashion tie-ins.

Her style is unique, lively and elegant.

Sophia is still active on social media, but in recent years she has become more privacy-conscious, gradually reducing the frequency of her content posts and focusing more on her personal life.

She also works as a graphic model, beauty blogger, and fashion blogger, and has appeared in music videos of other artists.

In the Sophia Diamond latest creation, there is the content of her new boyfriend Cooper,

and soon, she posted a new piece of content:new video in which her new boyfriend Cooper proposes to her.

2024-06-07 Sophia Diamond on Instagram: "We're engaged!💍🫶🏼✨"
